text.first: The Feldenkrais Method is a somatic learning system that uses gentle, mindful movements to improve flexibility, coordination, and posture. The method is based on the principles of neuroplasticity, helping to retrain the nervous system, eliminate maladaptive movement patterns, reduce pain, and restore natural ease and grace of movement.
text.second: Developed by Moshe Feldenkrais, the method is now practiced worldwide. Certified practitioners work in Europe, North and South America, Israel, Australia, and Asia, and the method is used in fields such as health, education, performing arts, and rehabilitation.

reviews.name: Olga
reviews.text: After the classes, for the first time in many years, I stopped feeling tension in my lower back. Every movement became light and natural.

reviews.name: Elena
reviews.text: A subtle approach and real attention to detail. Maria sees the body deeply and helps you hear what it truly needs.
